title: KrakenD Service Configuration
description: The root configuration object for a KrakenD API Gateway instance, defining service-level settings, global defaults, and the collection of endpoint definitions.

$schema.description: Reference to the KrakenD JSON Schema for IDE autocompletion.

version.description: The configuration file version. Must be 3 for KrakenD v2.x.

name.description: Name of the KrakenD service instance.

port.description: Port on which the gateway listens for incoming requests.

host.description: Default list of backend hosts used when endpoints do not specify their own.

timeout.description: Default timeout for all endpoints. E.g., 3s or 3000ms.

cache_ttl.description: Default Cache-Control max-age for all endpoints.

output_encoding.description: Default output encoding for all endpoints.

listen_ip.description: IP address the service binds to. Empty means all interfaces.

debug_endpoint.description: Enables the /__debug/ endpoint for request inspection.

echo_endpoint.description: Enables the /__echo/ endpoint for request echoing.

sequential_start.description: Start the gateway only after all async agents are ready.

endpoints.description: The collection of endpoint definitions exposed by the gateway.

extra_config.description: Service-level component configurations keyed by namespace.

async_agent.description: Asynchronous agent definitions for consuming from queues and event streams.
